plugins.name: running-coach
plugins.description: Personalized running and Hyrox coaching plugin with 5 specialized skills: training-planner (build periodized plans), training-tracker (weekly reviews from Garmin), workout-builder (single workout creation/modification), race-week (7-day pre-race protocol), and race-strategy (km-by-km pacing from course profile). Supports 10km, half-marathon, marathon, and Hyrox preparation.
